scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@harmonyhill/utils && npm run build --workspace=@harmonyhill/database
scripts.pack:web: npm pack --workspace=@harmonyhill/utils --pack-destination apps/web && npm pack --workspace=@harmonyhill/database --pack-destination apps/web
scripts.pack:functions: npm pack --workspace=@harmonyhill/utils --pack-destination apps/functions && npm pack --workspace=@harmonyhill/database --pack-destination apps/functions
scripts.normalize:web: mv apps/web/harmonyhill-utils-*.tgz apps/web/harmonyhill-utils.tgz && mv apps/web/harmonyhill-database-*.tgz apps/web/harmonyhill-database.tgz
scripts.normalize:functions: mv apps/functions/harmonyhill-utils-*.tgz apps/functions/harmonyhill-utils.tgz && mv apps/functions/harmonyhill-database-*.tgz apps/functions/harmonyhill-database.tgz
scripts.prep:packages: npm run build:packages && npm run pack:web && npm run normalize:web && npm run pack:functions && npm run normalize:functions
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run prep:packages && firebase deploy --only functions
